text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Another summer camp has come to an end. I join
Symboli Rudolf in seeing the rest of the students
off safely before getting on the last bus.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if the rest of the students improved as
much as they hoped.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Did they meet the targets they had set for
themselves? Do they feel they've had a
productive summer?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've left them much more to their own devices this
year. I know they've been working hard—I've seen
it—but still, I worry.
choice_data_list: I'm sure they'll be all right.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Mhm... I think so too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: There's that controlling streak of yours again.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha. I'm well aware of it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Forget about them. Have you been working hard?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But of course. Isn't that right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I meant to ask. Are you finished making the
final checks?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Of course. Air Groove should be along soon too.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. Then we can be off as soon as she
arrives.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Heh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What are you smiling about?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing. I just realized that it will be you, me,
my trainer and Air Groove boarding the last bus.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Quite the gathering, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've caused you all no end of trouble over the
years. And what's more—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Save it for when the Empress gets back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
She handles sappy talk better than I do. You
know I hate that stuff.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And yet you still listen. You truly are kind at
heart.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I said what I said. You're a kind person.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Whaddaya think you're—tch, forget it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm back, President. I'm sorry I kept you wai—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Um, what is Brian doing? Isn't it a little hot to be
wrapped up in a blanket?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha. I wonder.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'll say this: between you three and the other
student council members, I couldn't have been
blessed with better friends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bus sets off, bearing us gently back to the
academy...
